payload.query: Political Institutions Matter. Agree or Disagree with this statement and be sure to include a discussion of electoral systems, executives, legislatures, federal vs. unitary systems, and at least one other political institution in your answer. Also, be clear as to how political institutions matter or why they do not matter.

articles.title: We Are Going to Have to Live Here With One Another
articles.abstract: Ben Shapiro and I discuss the state — and stakes — of political disagreement in America.
articles.snippet: Ben Shapiro and I discuss the state — and stakes — of political disagreement in America.

articles.title: The Supreme Court Is Backing Trump’s Power Grab
articles.abstract: The legal scholar Kate Shaw discusses Donald Trump’s recent winning streak with the Supreme Court and what it means for the state of the Constitution.
articles.snippet: The legal scholar Kate Shaw discusses Donald Trump’s recent winning streak with the Supreme Court and what it means for the state of the Constitution.

articles.title: Is Decarbonization Dead?
articles.abstract: Trump just shredded America’s most ambitious climate policy. Jane Flegal and Jesse Jenkins discuss what this means for the future of renewable energy in the U.S.

articles.title: Read the Supreme Court’s Decision on Trump’s Sweeping Tariffs
articles.abstract: In a major setback for President Trump’s economic agenda, the court ruled that he could not invoke an emergency power to set tariffs on imports.
articles.snippet: In a major setback for President Trump’s economic agenda, the court ruled that he could not invoke an emergency power to set tariffs on imports.

articles.title: Read the Court Ruling on Trump’s Use of the Alien Enemies Act
articles.abstract: The ruling was a setback for the Trump administration on the mass deportation of immigrants, one of its domestic policy goals.
articles.snippet: The ruling was a setback for the Trump administration on the mass deportation of immigrants, one of its domestic policy goals.

articles.title: How the Transgender Rights Movement Bet on the Supreme Court and Lost
articles.abstract: The inside story of the case that could set the movement back a generation.

articles.title: Crockett vs. Talarico. Progressive vs. Moderate. Right?

articles.title: Read Judge’s Ruling on Trump’s Use of Troops in California
articles.abstract: The ruling accused the president of effectively turning nearly 5,000 Marines and National Guard soldiers into a “national police force” during the immigration protests in June.
